_description: Add an icon to the control

_icon.desc: Icon to put on the control from the Bootstrap icon set. Examples: menu-app, trash, check. Optional. See the list of icons.

_iconTitle.desc: Text to display when hovering cursor over icon.

_bsIcon: {if icon<>''}''} title='{iconTitle}' data-i18n='{iconTitle!j}'{/if} aria-hidden='true'>{/if}{if icon==''}{/if}
